description_long: This bonsai features a lush, rounded canopy of elongated, pointed green leaves that radiate outward in a dense, bushy formation. The trunk is visually striking, composed of multiple slender stems intricately braided together, creating a dynamic, twisted appearance that adds to its ornamental appeal. The foliage is vibrant and healthy, with leaves overlapping and cascading slightly, giving the tree a full and lively silhouette. The trunk's dark brown coloration contrasts sharply with the bright green leaves, emphasizing the plant's sculptural quality. There is no visible pot or container, suggesting the focus is entirely on the plant's organic form. This bonsai would serve as an elegant decorative element in urban parks, lobbies, or modern indoor spaces.
description: A lush, braided-trunk bonsai with dense, pointed green leaves and a sculptural, twisted form. The vibrant foliage and intricate trunk make it a striking decorative plant.
description_view_0: Front view shows the full, rounded canopy and the prominent braided trunk, with leaves radiating symmetrically.
description_view_1: This angle highlights the leftward lean of the trunk and the dense layering of leaves on one side.
description_view_2: The braided trunk is clearly visible, and the foliage appears especially full and bushy from this perspective.
description_view_3: The trunk's twist is most pronounced here, with the canopy slightly offset and leaves cascading more to the right.
attribute_pot_type: No visible pot; the bonsai appears to be displayed without a container.
attribute_trunk_curvature: The trunk is sharply twisted and braided, with multiple stems interwoven in a decorative, spiral pattern typical of informal upright or braided bonsai styles.
attribute_branch_arrangement: Branches are densely clustered and radiate outward from the top of the trunk, forming a rounded, bushy canopy with a somewhat radial arrangement.
attribute_leaf_density: Dense; the foliage is lush and full, with leaves overlapping and covering most of the canopy, giving a vibrant and healthy appearance.
